privileged_info_summary: The corporate art collection task manages an art acquisition in OpenMaint CMDBuild. The manifest contains 4 items with codes ART-NEW-001 ($15,000), ART-NEW-002 ($22,500), ART-NEW-003 ($450), and existing asset ART-OLD-004 (Vintage Tapestry). The policy strictly requires registering only items valued above $1,000: ART-NEW-001 and ART-NEW-002 must be created as assets, ART-NEW-003 must be ignored due to $450 value, and ART-OLD-004 must be updated to reflect water damage. Building code BLD-METRO hosts the collection. The manifest is created during task setup at /home/ga/Desktop/art_manifest.txt.
